EXAMPLE 7: 

A physician has ordered medical social services for an insulin dependent diabetic whose 
blood sugar is elevated because she has run out of syringes and missed her insulin dose 
for two days. Upon making the assessment visit, the medical social worker learns that 
the patient's daughter, who is also an insulin dependent diabetic, has come to live with the
